# Reused instruction files

The `*.instructions.md` files in this folder are reused **verbatim** from
[github/awesome-copilot](https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot) (MIT licensed) so the SDLC
agents apply community-maintained .NET Framework / C# standards automatically (via their
`applyTo` globs) whenever Copilot edits `*.cs` / `*.csproj` files.

| File | Source |
|------|--------|
| `dotnet-framework.instructions.md` | awesome-copilot `instructions/dotnet-framework.instructions.md` |
| `csharp.instructions.md` | awesome-copilot `instructions/csharp.instructions.md` |
| `dotnet-architecture-good-practices.instructions.md` | awesome-copilot `instructions/dotnet-architecture-good-practices.instructions.md` |

To refresh: re-download from the upstream `main` branch.
